---
title: "2026-07-01"
---

Discussed with advisor. Several points to deal.

Ice. In previous explore,
I don't even remember how I dealed with the 0 temperature data.
Need to calculate the ice cover days in monthly and annual scale.

Clustering. Too many clusters, hard to explain the meaning of each cluster.

Attribution. Teleconnection analysis showed that the 5 teleconnection indices
are not significantly correlated with the wamring speed and acceleration.
Maybe we need to consider the local climate factors or geographical factors.
